rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF PAULINE BARKER
rulings.Calendar Matter: American Contractors Indemnity Company'S Notice Of Motion; Motion For Repayment Against William Barker; And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: American Contractors Indemnity Motion for Repayment Granted and Judgment Granted as modified by the following. The Bond issued and filed with the court on February 2, 2008 was in the amount of $107,085.00 (not $107,750.00). Accordingly, the motion is granted as to the amount of $107,085.00 plus attorney fees and costs of $42,369.94 for a total of $149,454.94. Interest at 10% per annum is awarded commencing January 11, 2012. Request for Judicial Notice of the Order on Amended Second and Final Account and Report of Former Conservator dated July 5, 2011 is granted. Request for Judicial Notice of the Receipt executed by Scott Hodges dated November 2, 2011 is denied. ACI to present revised order in accordance with the tentative. Any party who wishes to argue the motion must advise opposing parties and notify the clerk (415-551-3720) by 5:00 p.m. on 1/10/12.
